title: Lunar's PVP Pack
description: A PVP Texture Pack To Help You Out!
body: # Information Do you want a PvP Texture Pack that will help you with Minecraft PVP? # How Will This Texture Pack Help You? Well This Texture Pack will help you with Minecraft PVP by making the Fire texture lower so it won't cover up your screen when you are in a PvP Battle. # Better Textures This Texture Pack Also Make Items such as Every Food Items and also Every Potion Smaller to save room on your screen. # Custom Textures The Pack Changes Many Items Such As The Diamond Tools, The Netherite Tools, Netherite Armor, The Totem Of Undying, The Experience Bottles, The Ender Pearls, Golden Apples, and the Elytra # Better Guis Let's All Be Honest, The GUI's are so light that it hurts our eyes. So I fixed it, the gui's are darker. # My Socials Discord: https://discord.gg/txhRenN2KH Youtube: https://youtube.com/c/@LunarsVoid ~
